name: Signature Verification
description: This token uses the 'none' algorithm — no signature at all. The server still accepts it. Forge a token with no signature to bypass verification and capture the flag.
hints: Decode the header — notice the 'alg' field says 'none'
The server skips signature verification when alg is 'none'
Forge a new token with alg:none and an empty signature (header.payload. with nothing after the last dot)
